questions.text: The mean of first 10 natural numbers is:
For a symmetrical distribution, mean = median = mode.
questions.explanation: In a perfectly symmetrical distribution, mean, median, and mode are all equal.

questions.text: What is a cumulative frequency curve?
questions.correctAnswer: A graph showing cumulative frequency against upper class boundaries.
questions.explanation: Cumulative frequency curve (ogive) is used to find median graphically.

questions.text: The empirical relationship between mean, median and mode is Mode = 3Median - ________Mean.
